pages.name: Home
pages.description: Entry point to the corporate website with access to main product categories, search, and key actions. Provides global navigation and highlights featured categories/subcategories used in common tasks.
primary_functions: Provide global search bar to find products like printers or docking stations
Provide main navigation access to Furniture, Office Supplies, Electronics, Facilities, and Software Solutions categories
Highlight quick links to subcategories such as Office Chairs, Paper & Media, Monitors, Cleaning Supplies, and Analytics
Provide direct access to Quick Order by SKU, Saved Items, Cart, and Support

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on featured 'Office Chairs' tile or header 'Office Chairs' navigation link
Click on featured 'Paper & Media' tile or header 'Paper & Media' navigation link
Click on featured 'Monitors' tile or header 'Monitors' navigation link
Click on featured 'Cleaning Supplies' tile or header 'Cleaning Supplies' navigation link
Click on featured 'Analytics' tile or header 'Analytics' navigation link
Submit global search form (e.g., type 'color laser printer' and press Enter)
Click on 'Quick Order' link in header or homepage shortcut
Click on 'Saved Items' link/icon in header
Click on 'Cart' icon in header

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Home' link in the header navigation
Default landing page at index.html

pages.name: Category Listing
pages.description: Reusable listing page for browsing products within a specific category or subcategory. Supports filtering, sorting, and comparison operations used in furniture, paper, electronics, facilities, and software task flows.
primary_functions: Display products within a chosen category such as office_chairs, paper_media, monitors, cleaning_supplies, or analytics
Provide filter sidebar for refining products by attributes such as price range, rating, product type, size, eco-certification, shipping options, and compatibility
Provide sorting controls including options like Price - Low to High, Price - High to Low, Rating - High to Low, and relevance
Allow users to click a product card to open its product detail page
Allow users to mark products for comparison and navigate to the comparison page
Support pagination or infinite scroll for larger product sets

incoming_params.description: Category code (e.g., 'office_chairs', 'paper_media', 'monitors', 'cleaning_supplies', 'analytics') determining which category of products to display.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a product card in the category results list
Click on 'Compare' button after selecting multiple products via 'Compare' checkboxes
Click on cart icon in header while browsing a category

access_methods.description: Accessible using category links such as 'Furniture', 'Office Chairs', 'Paper & Media', 'Electronics', 'Monitors', 'Facilities', 'Cleaning Supplies', 'Software Solutions', and 'Analytics'.
Requires 'categoryId' query parameter to identify which category to load.
Linked from homepage featured category cards and internal promotional banners.

pages.name: Search Results
pages.description: Listing page that shows products matching a text search query with advanced filters and sorting. Used for flows such as searching for color laser printers or docking stations.
primary_functions: Display search results for queries such as color laser printer or ProBook 450 docking station

Provide filters to refine search by price range, product type (for example printer type), features (such as duplex printing, Wi-Fi connectivity), color printing, eco-certification, shipping options, rating, and compatibility
Provide sorting controls such as Price - Low to High and Rating - High to Low
Allow users to click product cards to open product detail pages
Allow users to select products for comparison where appropriate

incoming_params.description: Search query text entered into the global search bar (e.g., 'color laser printer', 'ProBook 450 docking station').

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a product card in the search results
Click 'Compare' button after selecting multiple products for comparison
Click on cart icon in header from search results page

access_methods.description: Accessed after form submission from the search bar using the 'query' parameter.
Search form built into the global header submits to search.html.

pages.name: Product Detail
pages.description: Detailed information page for a single product, including configuration and purchase actions. Supports selecting options (e.g., color), adding to cart, saving to wishlist, and launching quote or demo flows.
primary_functions: Display full product information including images, specifications, features, pricing, rating, and reviews
Allow users to select product options such as color (for example Black chairs or docking stations) and variants if applicable
Allow users to set quantity before adding items to the cart
Provide shipping options for the product, such as selecting Standard shipping (3–5 business days)
Allow users to add the product to the shopping cart
Allow users to add the product to the saved items or wishlist list
Provide a Request a quote button for eligible products like printers that leads to the quote request page
Provide a Schedule a demo button for software products such as Enterprise Analytics Suite that leads to the demo request page

incoming_params.description: Product ID indicating which product details to display.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on cart icon after adding a configured product to the cart
Click on 'Request a quote' button for an eligible product (e.g., printer)
Click on 'Schedule a demo' button for a software product supporting demos
Click on 'Saved Items' link/icon in header after adding a product to saved items

access_methods.description: Accessed with an 'id' parameter specifying the product to display.
Linked from category listings, search results, comparison tables, and saved items lists.

pages.name: Shopping Cart
pages.description: Central view of all items the user intends to purchase before checkout. Supports editing quantities, removing items, updating shipping per item, and initiating checkout.
primary_functions: Display a list of items added to the cart with product names, options, quantities, prices, and subtotals
Allow users to update quantities or remove items from the cart
Show overall cart totals including any estimated taxes or shipping if applicable
Provide a clear Proceed to checkout action to move to the checkout page
Act as a destination when users click the cart icon from the header

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on 'Proceed to checkout' button
Click on 'Continue shopping' link/button (if provided) to return to the homepage

access_methods.description: Accessible at any time via 'Cart' icon/link in the header.
Linked after quick order or from confirmation messages when adding items to cart.

pages.name: Checkout
pages.description: Page where users provide order details and choose payment before final review. Uses the current checkout session created from the cart and supports selecting payment methods like invoice.
primary_functions: Collect or display shipping and billing address details for the order
Allow users to choose or confirm shipping methods if not already chosen per product
Provide payment method options including Business customer - pay by invoice
Allow users to review a summarized list of items and costs prior to final confirmation
Provide a Continue to order summary button that leads to the order summary page

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on 'Continue to order summary' after selecting 'Business customer - pay by invoice' or another payment method
Click on 'Back to cart' link to adjust cart contents

access_methods.description: Reached after clicking 'Proceed to checkout' on cart.html, which creates a checkout session.
Can be loaded directly to resume an in-progress checkout session stored in localStorage.

pages.name: Order Summary
pages.description: Final review page summarizing the placed or ready-to-place order. Shows full financial breakdown and confirms payment method selection such as invoice.
primary_functions: Display a complete summary of the order including items, quantities, prices, shipping method, payment method, and totals
Allow users to verify that quick order items such as 50 units of SKU SW-1000 are correctly included
Provide confirmation messaging that the user has reached the order summary stage of checkout
Offer options to print or save the summary for record keeping

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on 'Edit order' or 'Back to checkout' to modify payment or shipping details
Click on 'Return to homepage' after reviewing or placing the order

access_methods.description: Reached by progressing from checkout.html using the 'Continue to order summary' action.
Can be reloaded to view the latest order summary for the active checkout session.

pages.name: Quote Request
pages.description: Form page for requesting a price quote for a specific product, typically higher-value hardware such as printers. Shows key product context while collecting requester details.
primary_functions: Display context of the selected product, such as the chosen color laser printer under consideration
Provide a form with fields for name, company, email, quantity, and optional comments
Allow users to submit quote requests, for example entering Alex Smith, Acme Corp, alex.smith@example.com, and desired quantity
Show a confirmation message or status after submission indicating the quote request has been received

incoming_params.description: ID of the product for which a quote is being requested.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on 'Back to product details' after submitting or cancelling the quote request

access_methods.description: Opened from a product detail page via 'Request a quote', passing the productId.
Quote form submission handled entirely on this page.

pages.name: Product Comparison
pages.description: Side-by-side comparison page for multiple products selected from listings. Primarily used for monitor comparison but supports any comparable products.
primary_functions: Display selected products in a comparison table with key attributes such as screen size, resolution, price, rating, and features
Highlight differences between compared products, such as which 27-inch monitor has the higher resolution
Allow users to click on a product name in the comparison table to open its product detail page
Allow users to adjust which products are in the comparison if necessary

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a product name within the comparison table to view full details

access_methods.description: Accessed via 'Compare' button/link from category or search results pages after selecting products to compare.
Can be bookmarked to revisit the current comparison set stored in localStorage.

pages.name: Quick Order by SKU
pages.description: Page for fast bulk ordering by entering product SKUs and quantities. Supports validation and a single action to add all items, as used for network switch bulk ordering.
primary_functions: Provide multiple rows for entering product SKUs and corresponding quantities, such as SW-1000 with quantity 50
Validate SKUs and quantities and show basic product details for confirmation
Allow users to add all listed SKUs to the cart with a single Add all to cart action
Provide a quick path into the checkout flow via the cart after adding items

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on cart icon after successfully adding quick-order SKUs to cart

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Quick Order' link in the header navigation.
Accessible via 'Quick Order' link in footer navigation.

pages.name: Saved Items
pages.description: Wishlist-style page where users can store products for later consideration. Supports moving items into the cart for purchase.
primary_functions: Display a list of products the user has marked as saved or wishlist items, such as a docking station compatible with ProBook 450
Allow users to move saved items into the shopping cart
Allow users to remove items from the saved list
Provide quick navigation back to product detail pages for saved items

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a saved item product name or image
Click 'View cart' or the cart icon after moving saved items into the cart

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Saved Items' link in the header navigation.
Accessible via 'Saved Items' link in the footer.

pages.name: Demo Request
pages.description: Form page for scheduling product demos for software solutions such as the Enterprise Analytics Suite. Presents available time slots and captures attendee information.
primary_functions: Display context for the software product for which a demo is being scheduled, such as Enterprise Analytics Suite
Provide a form to collect full name, work email, preferred date, preferred time, and number of attendees
Support date selection for a specific date, such as April 15, 2026, via a date picker
Allow users to submit a demo request and display a confirmation message after submission

incoming_params.description: ID of the software product for which the demo is being requested.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on 'Back to product details' after submitting or cancelling the demo request

access_methods.description: Opened from a software product detail page using 'Schedule a demo', passing the productId.
Demo request form submission handled on this page.

pages.name: About
pages.description: Corporate information page describing the company and its mission, values, and focus on office solutions for business customers.
primary_functions: Present an overview of the company, its history, and its values
Communicate the companys focus on corporate customers and office solutions
Provide links to related pages such as Contact and Policies for additional information

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on 'Contact us' link within the About content
Click on 'View our policies' link within the About content

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'About' link in footer navigation.
Can be opened directly by visiting about.html.

pages.name: Contact
pages.description: General contact page for inquiries and communication. Provides contact details and a form for sending inquiries related to products, orders, quotes, or demos.
primary_functions: Provide contact methods including a general inquiry form, email addresses, and phone numbers
Allow users to submit questions related to products, orders, quotes, or demos
Display corporate office locations and business hours if relevant

incoming_params.description: Optional topic preselection for the inquiry form (e.g., 'orders', 'quotes', 'demos', 'support').

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on 'Return to homepage' after submitting an inquiry

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Contact' link in footer navigation.
Linked from About and Support content sections for escalation.

pages.name: Support
pages.description: Support and help center for post-sales and general assistance. Includes FAQs and guides for ordering, shipping, returns, and site features like quotes, demos, quick order, and cart management.
primary_functions: Provide FAQs and self-help content for ordering, shipping, returns, and product usage
Offer links to contact support channels, including the Contact page
Provide guidance on how to request quotes, schedule demos, use quick order, and manage the cart

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on 'Contact support' link from FAQ or guide content
Click on help link that demonstrates or shortcuts to Quick Order by SKU
Click on help link that navigates to the cart for cart management guidance

access_methods.description: Accessible from 'Support' link in the header navigation.
Accessible from 'Support' link in the footer.

pages.name: Policies
pages.description: Central page for legal and transactional policies, including terms, privacy, cookies, and shipping/returns/warranty information.
primary_functions: Present terms and conditions, privacy policy, and cookie information
Outline shipping, returns, and warranty policies for purchased products
Provide transparency on data handling for quote requests, demo requests, and orders

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on 'Questions about our policies?' link

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Policies' link in footer navigation.
Can be opened directly by visiting policies.html.

header_links.description: Homepage with featured products and global navigation
Office chairs category for ergonomic seating products
Paper and media products including A4 paper
Electronics category including monitors and printers
Analytics software including Enterprise Analytics Suite
Bulk order products quickly by SKU
View and manage saved or wishlist items
View and edit items in the shopping cart
